title: Converge Workflow branches
excerpt: The ability to reconverge workflow branches. This would eliminate the need for multiple identical branches downline when sorting or waiting on columns to be filled in.

posts.author: natecarter (Nate Carter)
posts.cookedHtml: The ability to reconverge workflow branches. This would eliminate the need for multiple identical branches downline when sorting or waiting on columns to be filled in.

posts.author: UFAI (Adam)
posts.cookedHtml:
This would be amazing!

If people aren’t sure what we’re referring to, I’ve attached a photo of what it would look like.

Doubled Workflows948×723 81.9 KB

I need to carve out a little section to send a notification to items in a specific group, and it has to happen before the “Check: Outside of Work Hours”. But now I have to duplicate everything on two sides because it won’t allow me to converge back to the original workflow.

posts.author: bcr (CS)
posts.cookedHtml: This would indeed be amazing, and I’m surprised it’s not available yet. There are times when this functionality could be avoided with a more streamlined kind of if/then action. For example, If Status is blank, change it to X. Else, continue, pause, etc.—no need to branch the workflow.

posts.author: AdrienJ (Adrien Jeannerot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Great idea, but it’s a duplicate of an existing request. Upvote this idea instead if you want this functionality to stand out in the backlog!

Merge lanes after an if condition in workflow
